sections.instruction: Helenning rasmlariga qarang va berilgan so'zlardan foydalanib gaplar tuzing. Present Simple ning to'g'ri shaklini ishlating.
sections.instruction_ru: Посмотрите на картинки Хелен и составьте предложения, используя подсказки. Используйте правильную форму Present Simple.

images.caption: every day / get up / at half past seven
once a week / watch a film at the cinema
often / eat fast food for lunch
in the evening / usually / meet her friends for coffee
have a driving lesson / twice a week

parts.content: every day / get up / at half past seven

answers: Every day Helen gets up at half past seven.
alternateAnswers: Every day Helen gets up at half past seven.
Helen gets up at half past seven every day.
Every day, she gets up at half past seven.
Every day she gets up at half past seven.
She gets up at half past seven every day.
cards.prefilled: Every day Helen gets up at half past seven.

parts.content: often / eat fast food / for lunch

answers: She often eats fast food for lunch.
alternateAnswers: Helen often eats fast food for lunch.

parts.content: in the evening / usually / meet her friends for coffee

answers: In the evening, she usually meets her friends for coffee.
alternateAnswers: In the evening she usually meets her friends for coffee.
She usually meets her friends for coffee in the evening.
Helen usually meets her friends for coffee in the evening.
In the evening, Helen usually meets her friends for coffee.
In the evening Helen usually meets her friends for coffee.

parts.content: once a week / watch a film / at the cinema

answers: Once a week, she watches a film at the cinema.
alternateAnswers: Once a week she watches a film at the cinema.
She watches a film at the cinema once a week.
Once a week, Helen watches a film at the cinema.
Helen watches a film at the cinema once a week.

answers: She rarely goes to the gym.
alternateAnswers: Helen rarely goes to the gym.

parts.content: have a driving lesson / twice a week

answers: She has a driving lesson twice a week.
alternateAnswers: Helen has a driving lesson twice a week.
She has driving lessons twice a week.
Helen has driving lessons twice a week.

sections.instruction: Qavslar ichidagi fe'llarning Present Continuous shaklini to'g'ri yozing. Ba'zi gaplar inkor shaklda bo'lishi mumkin.
sections.instruction_ru: Вставьте правильную форму Present Continuous глаголов в скобках. Возможно, вам придётся использовать отрицательные формы.

sections.instruction: Qalin yozilgan so'zlarni to'g'ri shaklga o'zgartiring.
sections.instruction_ru: Исправьте слова и фразы, выделенные жирным шрифтом.

cards.sentence: Are top musicians studying for many years?
What's going on? I hope you don't touch my things!
It's a small business, so each person is doing lots of different jobs.
Does Christine listen to the radio, or is that the TV I can hear?
I am usually buying a special ticket each week for the bus because it's cheaper.
Our washing machine is starting when you press this button.
How's the match going? Does our team win?
Many people are enjoying spending time on the beach on holiday.

sections.instruction: Qutidagi fe'llarni Present Simple yoki Present Continuous shaklida to'ldiring. Ba'zi gaplar inkor shaklda bo'lishi mumkin.
sections.instruction_ru: Дополните предложения правильной формой Present Simple или Present Continuous глаголов из рамки. Возможно, вам придётся использовать отрицательные формы.

sections.instruction: Matnda noto'g'ri zamonda ishlatilgan o'nta fe'lni toping va to'g'ri shaklini yozing.
sections.instruction_ru: Найдите в тексте десять глаголов в неправильном времени и напишите их правильную форму.

textErrorData.passage: One game I am loving is backgammon. You are throwing the dice and then you move your pieces around the board. It is seeming quite easy, but in fact you are needing to be quite careful. When your piece lands on one of the other person's pieces, you are taking it off the board and you send it back to the beginning. You are winning by getting all your pieces to the end and off the board. Some people are preferring chess, but I am not understanding that game. Right now, I wait to have a game with my brother. He does his homework. I usually win, so I think he doesn't want to play a game with me!
